title: encyclia quesneliana
intro: Encyclia quesneliana, also known as the Yellow Encyclia or Quezel's Encyclia, is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Encyclia quesneliana include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antipyretic. In herbal preparations, Encyclia quesneliana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
